law: Every runtime must name a beneficiary, justified trigger, bounded action, useful output, completion condition, and idle no-op. No schedule without a time-dependent reason. No idle LLM. One claim owner per task cell.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Classify every registered loop by the receipt it serves so purposeless automation is visible.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Weekly freshness SLA for automation surface drift vs registry.

contracts.bounded_action: Enumerate workflows, assign value_class, write census receipt; no deploy or LLM.
contracts.success_metric: Census receipt published weekly with zero unregistered SG workflows.
contracts.completion_condition: Census artifact written and validator exit 0.
contracts.rollback: Disable workflow schedule; retain last census artifact.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Detect stale law pointers before agents execute against expired doctrine.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Weekly drift check for alive-doc registry freshness.

contracts.bounded_action: Diff alive docs vs registry pointers; emit staleness receipt.
contracts.success_metric: Staleness receipt lists zero high-severity stale law pointers.
contracts.completion_condition: Receipt written for the ISO week.
contracts.rollback: Disable schedule; keep last receipt.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Prove auth surfaces still enforce redirect allow-lists and credential path rules.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Security freshness SLA — credential/auth regressions must surface within 6h.

contracts.bounded_action: Probe allow-listed auth surfaces; write GUARD receipt; no mutation.
contracts.success_metric: Probe PASS with no open redirect or credential-path defect.
contracts.completion_condition: Probe receipt terminal PASS or FAIL recorded.
contracts.rollback: Disable schedule; leave surfaces online.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Containment observation only; must not promote or mutate while HOLD.
contracts.bounded_action: Manual observe-only receipt; secret presence never authorizes mutation.
contracts.success_metric: No autonomous promote while HOLD.
contracts.completion_condition: Manual observe receipt written or workflow skipped.
contracts.rollback: Remain disabled; do not re-enable schedule under HOLD.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Mac brain autorun remains booted out under containment.
contracts.bounded_action: Installer fails closed on governance/runtime HOLD; no tick.
contracts.success_metric: LaunchAgent remains unloaded.
contracts.completion_condition: Service not running.
contracts.rollback: Keep booted out.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Drain SourceA runtime plans / work orders on a freshness SLA without idle LLM.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Lease recovery and work-order freshness for SourceA desired-state queue.

contracts.bounded_action: Claim pending work orders; no-op when queue empty; never call LLM on idle.
contracts.success_metric: Pending work orders drain; idle ticks write nothing.
contracts.completion_condition: Queue empty or claimed items terminal.
contracts.rollback: Disable cron; leave queue intact.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Advance cloud forge queue items that are explicitly unfinished.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Cloud forge queue lease recovery; empty queue must no-op.

contracts.bounded_action: Process unfinished forge jobs; idle = no write/LLM/notify.
contracts.success_metric: Unfinished jobs progress; zero receipt churn when empty.
contracts.completion_condition: Job terminal or queue empty no-op.
contracts.rollback: Disable cron; preserve queue.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Keep TrustField loop fleet healthy so assessment/evidence jobs can run when requested.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Fleet lease recovery and lane self-heal freshness for TrustField loops.

contracts.bounded_action: Health/self-heal fleet lanes; no assessment package without customer event.
contracts.success_metric: Fleet healthy; customer assessment jobs claimable when queued.
contracts.completion_condition: Tick reports healthy or self-heal applied once.
contracts.rollback: Disable fleet cron; leave production intake loop.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Detect silent TrustField loop death within 10 minutes.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Deadman freshness SLA for TrustField loop registry.

contracts.bounded_action: Probe registry freshness; alert only on transition to unhealthy.
contracts.success_metric: Deadman GREEN or single transition alert.
contracts.completion_condition: Probe recorded.
contracts.rollback: Disable deadman; rely on manual health checks.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Verify TrustField recipe runners remain executable for customer assessments.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Recipe executable freshness check; empty/no-change must no-op.

contracts.bounded_action: Verify recipe definitions; do not re-run completed customer assessments.
contracts.success_metric: Recipes verify PASS; no duplicate customer assessment runs.
contracts.completion_condition: Verify run terminal.
contracts.rollback: Disable verify cron.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Process TrustField intake/receipt chain so registered programs become assessment packages.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Batched customer intake commitments; empty queue no-op.

contracts.bounded_action: Drain unfinished TF intake/receipt work; emit assessment when program.created queued.
contracts.success_metric: Queued program assessments reach package+status within SLA.
contracts.completion_condition: Queue empty or items terminal with package refs.
contracts.cost_time_ceiling: 15m wall / LLM only after deterministic admission
contracts.rollback: Disable production loop schedule; keep status pages.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Frozen preview motor — no new customer work.
contracts.bounded_action: No new work registered against preview motor.
contracts.success_metric: Zero new jobs claimed by preview motor.
contracts.completion_condition: Remains frozen.
contracts.rollback: Remain frozen.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Prove SourceA public contract surfaces remain live and deterministic.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: External uptime/determinism freshness for public contract pages.

contracts.bounded_action: Run L4 external verify; write GUARD receipt; no deploy.
contracts.success_metric: External verify PASS every 6h.
contracts.completion_condition: Verify receipt terminal.
contracts.rollback: Disable schedule; keep last PASS receipt.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Finite factory ticks must not echo forever without customer/output beneficiary.
contracts.bounded_action: Quarantined: do not restart completed factory cycles; convert remaining work to explicit events.
contracts.success_metric: No purposeless 10-minute factory restarts.
contracts.completion_condition: Schedule disabled or converted to event-driven unfinished jobs only.
contracts.rollback: Remain quarantined; require founder event to resume finite unfinished cycle.
contracts.notes: Purposeless finite echo loop; conflicts with cf_auto_runtime_tick_v1.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Compile/lint/route prompt packets in shadow with zero execution.
contracts.bounded_action: Compile+lint+route only; never execute packets.
contracts.success_metric: Shadow cycle receipt with zero execution side effects.
contracts.completion_condition: Cycle receipt written.
contracts.rollback: Stop launchd; keep last receipt.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Founder-manual shadow compile/lint/route for validated packets.
contracts.bounded_action: workflow_dispatch shadow only; zero execution.
contracts.success_metric: Manual shadow PASS with validated packet path.
contracts.completion_condition: Cycle receipt written.
contracts.rollback: Leave workflow_dispatch-only.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Admit signed site/machine events once, claim once, execute mapped Runway once, emit receipt.
contracts.bounded_action: Validate event, persist ledger, claim, start mapped Runway/Workflow; HOLD blocks merge/deploy/publish.
contracts.success_metric: One event → one claim → one execution → one receipt; unknown routes fail closed.
contracts.completion_condition: Job terminal succeeded/failed/cancelled with callback.
contracts.rollback: Disable site route contracts; keep ledger.
contracts.notes: Shared spine for SourceB workspace, Noetfield enterprise intake, TrustField assessment.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Run commissioning only for explicit unfinished/invalidated jobs; never repeat completed evidence.
contracts.bounded_action: Single Cloudflare claim owner dispatches one executor once; callback closes job; idle = no LLM.
contracts.success_metric: Explicit job reaches commissioned evidence without duplicate PR/LLM burn.
contracts.completion_condition: Job terminal with single executor callback.
contracts.retry_backoff: resume pending only; no redispatch of same job
contracts.cost_time_ceiling: 1 LLM diagnosis max per unfinished job
contracts.rollback: Remain on-demand; cron stays empty.
contracts.notes: Cron disabled; /tick returns 410; Cloudflare is sole claim owner.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Authenticated SourceB OTP verify produces a completed workspace blueprint, preview, and receipt.
contracts.bounded_action: Dispatch sourceb-workspace Motor job; project status to /workspace/[slug]; no GitHub churn.
contracts.success_metric: One OTP verify → one Motor job → succeeded preview+receipt.
contracts.completion_condition: motor_jobs.status=succeeded with preview_url and receipt_json.
contracts.retry_backoff: Motor retry then dead-letter receipt in workspace UI
contracts.cost_time_ceiling: 5m wall; LLM only inside admitted workspace compile if required
contracts.rollback: Disable workspace Motor route; keep OTP/session and manual setup messaging.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Pilot intake becomes a persisted qualified enterprise record with next step and SLA.
contracts.bounded_action: Deterministic qualify AI Value OS briefing intake; emit one transition notice; optional brief pack.
contracts.success_metric: Qualified intake persisted with tier/next_step/SLA; one notify.
contracts.completion_condition: qualification_json written and receipt emitted.
contracts.cost_time_ceiling: 30s qualify; LLM summary only after score
contracts.rollback: Disable qualifier emit; keep durable intake + email/Telegram fallback.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Fail closed on PRs that add schedules or motors without a Runtime Value Contract.
contracts.bounded_action: Validate registry + runtime value contracts + unit tests; no deploy.
contracts.success_metric: PR cannot merge registry changes that break Runtime Value Contract.
contracts.completion_condition: CI job terminal PASS/FAIL.
contracts.rollback: Disable workflow; validators remain runnable locally.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Produce one terminal synthetic proof that the three site-flow contracts are activation-ready without live submissions.
contracts.bounded_action: Run the fixed site-flow canary proof once, seal it, and persist one staging R2 receipt key.
contracts.success_metric: One hash-verified PASS_SYNTHETIC_CANARIES receipt for all three flows and zero model calls.
contracts.completion_condition: A matching valid receipt is read from R2 after upload, or an existing matching valid receipt causes a no-op.
contracts.retry_backoff: manual or controller redispatch; queued concurrency never cancels an active run
contracts.cost_time_ceiling: 10m wall / $0 LLM / one staging R2 object
contracts.rollback: Disable the dispatch-only workflow; retain the immutable staging receipt for audit.
contracts.notes: Production submissions remain HOLD; CF_MAIN_TOKEN is the only Cloudflare credential accepted.

contracts.business_customer_goal: program.created yields a downloadable governance evidence package and status.
contracts.bounded_action: Assemble health+audit+reconciliation into versioned package; preparation support only.
contracts.success_metric: One registration → one package with deterministic source refs.
contracts.completion_condition: Package manifest stored; status shows download.
contracts.rollback: Disable assessment emit; keep register/status/checklist.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Close a finite 48h liveness test once when the window ends.
contracts.bounded_action: Evaluate start receipt and write closeout once; not a recurring scheduler.
contracts.success_metric: One closeout receipt per started 48h test.
contracts.completion_condition: Closeout receipt written or skip if no start.
contracts.rollback: Ignore repository_dispatch; leave start receipt.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Ship on-demand commissioning Worker changes without re-enabling perpetual cron.
contracts.bounded_action: Deploy Worker with crons=[] asserted; put model secrets.
contracts.success_metric: Worker health shows schedule_enabled=false after deploy.
contracts.completion_condition: Deploy job terminal.
contracts.rollback: Redeploy previous Worker version; keep cron empty.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Deploy AI circle Workers only when their code changes.
contracts.bounded_action: Test + dry-run + deploy circle Workers on path push.
contracts.success_metric: Deploy PASS after tests.
contracts.completion_condition: Deploy job terminal.
contracts.rollback: Redeploy previous Worker configs.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Apply key2 custody stamp once when bootstrap key1 stops authenticating.
contracts.bounded_action: One-shot prove/apply custody; open PR if stamped; not recurring.
contracts.success_metric: Single custody transition applied when key1 dead.
contracts.completion_condition: Prove script exit 0 or blocked_founder 3.
contracts.rollback: Revert custody PR; keep key1 until founder decision.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Keep the Motor Learning Organ cloud loop alive with observe-only heartbeat receipts until W1–W3 consume path is gated.

trigger.time_dependent_reason: Daily liveness + weekly ROI prior freshness for the learning organ stub; deadman expects 2x cadence heartbeats.

contracts.bounded_action: Write observe-only heartbeat / ROI prior receipts; no live prior promote, no model training, no HOLD lift.
contracts.success_metric: Scheduled heartbeat receipt lands; loop_registry last_fired_at updates; no promote claim.
contracts.completion_condition: Heartbeat or ROI receipt written for the cadence window.
contracts.rollback: Disable workflow schedule; retain last heartbeat receipts.
contracts.notes: STUB_OBSERVE_HEARTBEAT_ONLY — does not unlock live Model Learning promotion.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Fail closed on PRs that break the Motor Learning Organ W1 reference pipeline or attempt live prior promotion.
contracts.bounded_action: Run W1 fixture E2E + no-live-promo guards; no deploy, no prior promote.
contracts.success_metric: W1 validate CI PASS; live promo paths remain blocked.
contracts.completion_condition: CI job terminal PASS/FAIL.
contracts.rollback: Disable workflow; validators remain runnable locally.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Detect product category registry drift against evidence without mutating the registry.
contracts.bounded_action: Read-only category drift check; write CATEGORY_DRIFT_CHECK receipt; no deploy or registry mutation.
contracts.success_metric: Drift check exits with explicit PASS/FAIL receipt for the checked registry snapshot.
contracts.completion_condition: Receipt written under receipts/CATEGORY_DRIFT_CHECK_*.json.
contracts.rollback: Keep workflow_dispatch-only; do not enable schedule without unlock receipt.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Land a deterministic FIRST_REVENUE_RECEIPT from a PII-minimized Stripe checkout dispatch.
contracts.bounded_action: Run revenue receipt adapter script; commit receipt under receipts/revenue/; no cron.
contracts.success_metric: Each accepted checkout dispatch yields exactly one revenue receipt artifact.
contracts.completion_condition: Receipt committed or dry-run receipt written for test-mode events.
contracts.retry_backoff: none; re-dispatch with same session id is idempotent
contracts.rollback: Disable workflow_dispatch/repository_dispatch consumers; retain last receipt.

contracts.business_customer_goal: Aggregate Human Tax events into HTU receipts so repair labor is visible before anger.
contracts.bounded_action: Aggregate human-tax event ledger into receipts/human-tax/; no Goal Contract mutation; cloud autorun only after Phase A path enforcement.
contracts.success_metric: Meter receipt lists HTU totals without inventing founder interrupts.
contracts.completion_condition: Receipt written under receipts/human-tax/ or no-op when ledger empty.
contracts.rollback: Leave motor pending; keep Phase A path enforcement receipts.
